weight_descriptions.W_UNUSED_BLOCKS: Penalty for leaving hardware blocks unused; drives block utilization.
weight_descriptions.W_OCC_RANGE: Penalty on occupancy max-min across blocks; evens out logical assignment.
weight_descriptions.W_OCC_STD: Penalty on occupancy standard deviation; smoother occupancy balancing.
weight_descriptions.W_MULTI_BLOCK: Penalty on the number of rotations that touch multiple blocks.
weight_descriptions.W_SPAN: Penalty on the number of extra blocks touched by each rotation (k-1 span).
weight_descriptions.W_MST: Penalty on the graph distance among touched blocks; encourages spatial locality.
weight_descriptions.W_SPLIT: Penalty on uneven support split inside a multi-block rotation.
weight_descriptions.W_SUPPORT_PEAK: Penalty on the busiest block under rotation-touch load.
weight_descriptions.W_SUPPORT_RANGE: Penalty on max-min support load across blocks.
weight_descriptions.W_SUPPORT_STD: Penalty on support-load standard deviation across blocks.
